Class EndGameController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.EndGameController
public class EndGameController extends Object
JavaFX controller for the end-game screen. Displays the final ranking table and the global leaderboard fetched from the server.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    EndGameController.PlayerRankEntry
    Immutable row model for the end-game ranking table.

  • Constructor Details

    • EndGameController

      public EndGameController()
      Default constructor used by the JavaFX FXML loader.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Called by JavaFX after FXML node injection. Configures the column factories for the ranking table and sets the custom renderer for the global leaderboard list.

    • setData

      public void setData(List<PlayerDTO> winners, List<PlayerDTO> allPlayers)
      Populates the end-game screen with the winners and the ranking of all players. Players are sorted by descending Prestige Points.
      Parameters:
      winners - the list of winning players.
      allPlayers - the complete list of all players used to build the ranking.

    • setGlobalLeaderboard

      public void setGlobalLeaderboard(List<String> entries)
      Updates the global leaderboard list with the rows received from the server. May be called from the network thread; UI update is executed via Platform.runLater.
      Parameters:
      entries - the global leaderboard rows for the current player count, or null/empty list if unavailable.
